inputs.prompt: Professional brand logo for “FAMtastic” — a creative AI site/media/component studio ecosystem. Create a bold energetic wordmark inspired by an early-2000s playful FAMtastic logo with colorful FAM letters and a green burst, but upgraded for 2026: premium, cinematic, dark-screen friendly, polished vector aesthetic, strong F legibility, clear FAM + tastic treatment, memorable icon potential, usable for web app header, favicon, brand kit, and animated intro. No generic startup icon. Correct spelling: FAMtastic.
